title: Spicy Chicken Tagine
description: A classic Moroccan-inspired dish with a twist of spice, featuring chicken cooked in a flavorful tagine with algerian spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add algerian spice blend, sweet paprika, cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add 1 cup of water to the tagine and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
